zh.Neufmarché, Seine-Maritime, Upper Norman: 法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利福馬賀
zh.lifeSummary: 當Geoffrey de Neufmarché於大約1025年出生在法國諾門迪曼其圖爾可維爾時，他的父親Turquetil or Thurketill de Neufmarché39歲，母親Adeline de Montfort74歲。他於1049年與Ada II de Hugleville在法國諾門迪瑟-馬利福馬賀結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1100年在法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利格列維爾--考享年77歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Geoffrey de Neufmarché于大约1025年出生在法国諾門迪曼其圖爾可維爾时，他的父亲Turquetil or Thurketill de Neufmarché39岁，母亲Adeline de Montfort74岁。他于1049年与Ada II de Hugleville在法国諾門迪瑟-馬利福馬賀结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1100年在法国豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利格列維爾--考享年77岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Geoffrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic (Frankish and Lombard) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It was in regular use among the counts of Anjou, ancestors of the English royal house of Plantagenet, who were descended from Geoffrey Plantagenet, Count of Anjou ( 1113–51 ). It was a particularly popular name in England and France in the later Middle Ages; notable bearers in England include the poet Geoffrey Chaucer ( c.1340–1400 ) and in Wales the chronicler Geoffrey of Monmouth ( d. 1155 ). The original form and meaning of the name is disputed. According to one theory, it is merely a variant of Godfrey ; others derive the first part from the Germanic word gawia ‘territory’, walah ‘stranger’, or gisil ‘pledge’. Medieval forms can be found to support all these theories, and it is possible that several names have fallen together, or that the name was subjected to reanalysis by folk etymology at an early date.

en.lifeSummary: When Geoffrey de Neufmarché was born about 1025, in Turqueville, Manche, Normandy, France, his father, Turquetil or Thurketill de Neufmarché, was 39 and his mother, Adeline de Montfort, was 74. He married Ada II de Hugleville in 1049, in Neufmarché, Seine-Maritime, Normandy, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died about 1100, in Hugleville-en-Caux, Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy, France, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Geoffrey de Neufmarché est né environ 1025, à Turqueville, Manche, Normandie, France, son père, Turquetil or Thurketill de Neufmarché, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Adeline de Montfort, avait 74 ans. Il a épousé Ada II de Hugleville en 1049, à Neufmarché, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1100, à Hugleville-en-Caux, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, France, à l’âge de 77 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Geoffrey de Neufmarché um 1025 in Turqueville, Manche, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Turquetil or Thurketill de Neufmarché 39 und seine Mutter Adeline de Montfort 74. Er hat 1049 in Neufmarché, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Frankreich Ada II de Hugleville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1100 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Hugleville-en-Caux, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffrey de Neufmarché è nato il circa 1025 nel Turqueville, Manche, Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Turquetil or Thurketill de Neufmarché, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Adeline de Montfort, aveva 74 anni. Lui sposato Ada II de Hugleville nel 1049, nel Neufmarché, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1100, nel Hugleville-en-Caux, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, all'età di 77 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Geoffrey de Neufmarchéが約1025年にフランスノーマンディマンチェトゥルクエヴィルで生まれた時，父Turquetil or Thurketill de Neufmarchéは39歳，母Adeline de Montfortは74歳であった。1049年にフランスノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメネウフマルチeでAda II de Huglevilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1100年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメハグレヴィレ-エン-カウックスで77歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Geoffrey de Neufmarché(이)가 대략 1025년 프랑스 노먼디 먼체 터르크에빌에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Turquetil or Thurketill de Neufmarché(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Adeline de Montfort(은)는 74세였다. 그는 1049년 프랑스 노먼디 세이인-마이팀 니우프마che에서 Ada II de Hugleville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1100년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 세이인-마이팀 휴글레비레--카스에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.about 1025–about 1100: tany ho any amin'ny 1025–tany ho any amin'ny 1100

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffrey de Neufmarché nasceu aproximadamente 1025, em Turqueville, Manche, Normandie, França, seu pai, Turquetil or Thurketill de Neufmarché, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Adeline de Montfort, tinha 74 anos. Ele casou-se com Ada II de Hugleville em 1049, em Neufmarché, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1100, em Hugleville-en-Caux, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, França, com 77 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Geoffrey de Neufmarché родился около 1025 г. в местности туркуевилл, манч, норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Turquetil or Thurketill de Neufmarché было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Adeline de Montfort, 74. Он женился на женщине по имени Ada II de Hugleville в 1049 г. в местности неуфмарчe, сине-маритим, норманди, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1100 г. в местности хуглевилле-ен-каукс, сине-маритим, хауте-норманди, Франция в возрасте 77 лет.

sm.about 1025–about 1100: e tusa o le 1025–e tusa o le 1100

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Geoffrey de Neufmarché nació aproximadamente 1025, en Turqueville, Manche, Normandie, Francia, su papá, Turquetil or Thurketill de Neufmarché, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Adeline de Montfort, tenía 74 años. Se casó con Ada II de Hugleville en 1049, en Neufmarché, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1100, en Hugleville-en-Caux, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 77 años.
